system.description:
Religious Object

It is an eerie black disk of leviathan bone, about the size of a dinner plate but five times as thick. The bone is carved with a strange circular pattern with rays cutting through it. The primitive artwork was polished, and silver inlaid in the pattern, by a decadent nobleman.

Impressionable people admit the disk whispers to them, they hear the Back of the Mirror when the disk is near. Many cults see this disk as a conduit to clearer communication with their supernatural patrons.
